name: ListDetailBlueprint
description: A master-detail layout with a scrollable list on the left and detail view on the right. Ideal for email clients, file browsers, contact lists, and any list-based navigation.

visual.description: Split-pane layout with resizable divider. Left panel shows a searchable, scrollable list with selectable items. Right panel displays detailed view of selected item. On mobile, panels stack with back navigation.
visual.layout: split-pane with list panel and detail panel

props.name: items
props.description: Array of items to display in the list

props.name: selectedId
props.description: ID of the currently selected item

props.name: listWidth
props.description: Width of the list panel in pixels

props.name: searchable
props.description: Whether to show a search input

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message to show when no item is selected
props.defaultValue: Select an item to view details
